events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the legendary Queen guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite May riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger! Six decades in and still moving like no other. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched, changing music forever. The first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony is not lost on us.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. An album that defined a generation and still sounds as fresh as ever. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, '3 Days of Peace & Music', kicked off on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people descended on a field in New York for Woodstock. A defining moment for music and counterculture.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the death of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, 49 years after his passing. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since influential rapper Tupac Shakur passed away, he would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, we lost a hip-hop icon, Tupac Shakur. His words and music still resonate deeply. Remembering his incredible impact.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after his death. His innovative guitar work changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Goddess
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock legend and an unforgettable voice. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that pure rock and roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released 55 years ago today.

angles.name: Timeless Anthem
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A song that continues to inspire hope and peace around the world.

events.title: The first iPod was introduced 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Music In Your Pocket
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple introduced the first iPod. Suddenly, 1,000 songs in your pocket became a reality. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating over six decades of 007. What's your favourite Bond film or theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Remembering John
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message of peace live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Legendary comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the one and only John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedy legend.
